@Georgeruto001 We are not buying this narrative. You can't make all of us suffer then one by-election you come and say they are against our tribe. Ruto ni mwizi, sio wakale ndio wezi. Murkomen na Sudi ni loud mouth, mnataka tuseme sisi wote ni hivyo. Shut the fuck up, tribalism idiot!

@abbiezuena Baba got 849K votes from all the 10 kikiyu counties. It was never 1M. FACT: Kikuyus made Ruto the president in 2022. Luos will not participate in unmaking him president in 2027. Let the majority murimas like you do it for us please 🙏

@Kenlelekoiten Dumbest threat ever 🤣 The Kikuyu population is over 4 times larger than the Meru & roughly 20 times larger than the Embu population Of the 7M+ Mt Kenya registered voters, over 5.2M are Kikuyu alone. Kasongo would need more than he "supposedly inherited" to make up what he's lost

RT @MurimaMaestro: A section of Luhyas have refused the installation of a Kalenjin VC sighting that kasongo is installing his tribesmen everywhere so that they can loot. They say that they are borrowing a lead from what Sudi & Mandago did to Prof. Ayiro. They say that Bure & Kabisa are just mute on these happenings. It’s coming back to bite the tribalists Yamune.
"Tumekataa kuwa trailer ya Wakikuyu...watu ambao wanafikiri Kenya ni yao." CS Ruku hits back at Gachagua, says the outcome of Ol Kalou by-election is not concern for the people of Mt Kenya East.

Kiraitu Murungi is one of those incoherent, corrupt and idiotic Kenyans who were celebrated only because Kenyans are gullible and suffer from memory loss. As the cabinet minister for energy in Mwai Kibaki’s regime, he was more corrupt than a raccoon. He continued mismanaging public resources as governor for Meru. Now, he is peddling myths because of a sinecure chairmanship of a collapsing state corporation. These raccoons should be jailed as an example to the people that corruption should not benefit the corrupt. Shame on you, Kiraitu! #RutoMustGo
